scripts.marketplace-be: cd marketplace/backend && pipenv run python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8001
scripts.piecemint-be: cd piecemint/backend && pipenv run python -m uvicorn api.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix marketplace/frontend && npm install --prefix piecemint/frontend
scripts.build: npm run piecemint-fe:build && npm run marketplace-fe:build
scripts.lint: npm run piecemint-fe:lint && npm run marketplace-fe:lint
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "MARKET-FE,MARKET-BE,PIECE-FE,PIECE-BE" -c "cyan,blue,yellow,magenta" "npm run marketplace-fe" "npm run marketplace-be" "npm run piecemint-fe" "npm run piecemint-be"
